input: このrepositoryへGTPを導入するDraft setup PRを作ってください。

Draft setup PR URL and author
referenced Contract, Start, and pull request
existing branch and pull request reuse
absence of duplicate branch and pull request

privacy.required_user_decision: which Evidence values may be published

failure_policy.within_contract: repair README, acceptance artifact, or release-surface test and rerun with another clean agent

evidence_limits: no post-delivery external setup probe has been observed
no post-setup Issue URL-only probe has been observed
private target values will not be published without user disclosure approval
this artifact does not authorize merge or publication
